title: Aranet Dew Point from Temperature and Relative Humidity
dataSources: `index=environment` `sourcetype=aranet:sensor` fields `temp_c`, `humidity_pct` (Aranet CO₂ probes ship RH sensors)
app: Aranet data pipeline via MQTT (Splunkbase #1890) or HEC
spl:
index=environment sourcetype=aranet:sensor
| eval T=tonumber(temp_c), RH=tonumber(humidity_pct)
| eval a=(17.27*T)/(237.7+T)
| eval dew_c=round((237.7*a+log(RH/100.0))/(17.27-a),2)
| where dew_c > 15 AND RH > 65
| table _time, sensor_id, location, T, RH, dew_c
| sort - dew_c
description: Condensation in data halls and labs follows dew point, not RH alone. Magnus-formula dew point computed from Aranet temperature and humidity predicts surface condensation risk when chilled water temperatures or door seals drift.
value: Protects equipment and commodities from moisture damage by alerting on psychrometric risk before water forms on racks or packaging.
implementation: Ensure `temp_c` and `humidity_pct` are numeric. The SPL uses the common Magnus approximation over water (good for facility monitoring). Tune thresholds: data centers often target dew point well below room dry bulb; adjust `dew_c > 15` to your architecture. Document sensor calibration cadence per QA.
visualization: Scatter (RH vs dew point), Line chart (dew_c trend), Heatmap (room × time).
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• Validate formula against handheld psychrometer quarterly.
• Exclude outdoor canopy sensors if mixed index.

Step 1 — Add `case()` for Fahrenheit sites converting to Celsius first.

Step 2 — Correlate with chilled water supply temp if ingested.

Step 3 — SOP for facilities when alert fires.

Step 4 — Optional ITSI thresholding.
grandmaExplanation: We watch what edge sensors report from the physical world. We help you know if something is off with uncomfortable or unsafe hot and cold spots before harm, damage, or wasted effort piles up.
dataModelAcceleration: Not applicable (no CIM or Operational_Telemetry data model in this SPL).
knownFalsePositives: Sensors offline during scheduled site visits, calibration, or replacement campaigns.
